title:
iTero
Scan Experience
subtitle: Redesigning the clinical scanning workflow to improve speed, clarity, and decision-making in real treatment conditions.

slides.title:
iTero
Scan Experience
slides.description: Redesigning a fragmented clinical workflow to improve speed, clarity, and confidence during real-time scanning.

image.caption: iTero scanner during live clinical use

slides.label: Context
slides.title: A continuous clinical flow
slides.content: The iTero experience spans setup, scanning, and validation. Each phase serves a different purpose but must work as one system under time pressure.

image.caption: Full RX → Scan → View workflow overview

slides.label: Core Problems
slides.title: Where the system breaks
slides.description: Each phase evolved independently, creating friction during critical clinical moments.

issues.title: Rigid RX flow
issues.description: Users must complete everything before starting

slides.label: User Research
slides.title: What actually happens
slides.content: Real clinical behavior revealed breakdowns in confidence, speed, and clarity across the workflow.

quotes.text: When I open a case, I’m not always sure which procedure to choose. I go back and forth before starting.
quotes.author: Dr. Yael Levi

quotes.text: I double-check everything before I scan. If something feels off, I stop.
quotes.author: Dr. Amir Cohen

quotes.text: If I need to look for tools during scanning, I lose the flow immediately.
quotes.author: Dr. Noa Ben-David

quotes.text: Some tools don’t clearly tell me if it’s good or not. I just try again to be safe.
quotes.author: Dr. Eyal Mizrahi

quotes.text: I finish scanning but still rotate and check again. I’m not always sure I’m done.
quotes.author: Dr. Daniel Katz

quotes.text: Sometimes I adjust things even if they look fine, just because I don’t fully trust the result.
quotes.author: Dr. Lior Haddad

goals.title: Increase workflow speed
goals.description: Shorten time from RX to completed scan

goals.title: Increase user confidence
goals.description: Reduce need for re-checking and validation loops

kpis.description: Target reduction of total scan duration
Reduce incorrect actions and tool misuse
Faster transition from RX to scanning

slides.label: RX
slides.title: From rigid setup to flexible entry
slides.beforeDescription: Form-heavy setup requiring full completion before scanning.
slides.afterDescription: Simplified setup allowing faster and flexible entry.
slides.highlight: Users begin scanning faster with less hesitation.

slides.label: Icons
slides.title: From inconsistency to clarity
slides.beforeDescription: Inconsistent icons slowed recognition and increased errors.
slides.afterDescription: Unified icon system improved speed and usability.

slides.label: Scan
slides.title: Stabilizing interaction
slides.beforeDescription: Tools scattered across interface during scanning.

slides.label: Scan
slides.title: Tabs for flexibility
slides.content: Tabs allow switching between scan contexts without breaking flow, supporting more flexible workflows.

slides.label: Tools
slides.title: From manual control to guided actions
slides.beforeDescription: Tools required interpretation and repeated adjustments.
slides.afterDescription: Tools provide clearer feedback and simplified usage.

slides.label: View
slides.title: Clear validation state
slides.beforeDescription: No clear end state, causing repeated checks.
slides.afterDescription: Clear validation phase with structured feedback.
slides.highlight: Users know when they are done.

slides.label: View
slides.title: Multi-layer comparison
slides.content: Multi-layer panel enables comparison between scans using opacity control, improving clarity.

slides.label: Prototyping
slides.title: Built with Cursor
slides.content: All concepts were prototyped and tested using Cursor, enabling fast iteration and realistic simulations.

outcomes.title: Faster workflows
outcomes.description: Reduced time across the full flow
